name: codex-companion
description: Companion tools and schema-aware animated pet workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Install, repair, and extend Codex Companion.
interface.longDescription: Codex Companion provides update-safe desktop companion management and tools for creating, validating, and updating animated pets.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Companion to inspect or repair the sidecar and its animated pet packages.
